finding: Logging reductions moved SD card discovery to about 3 seconds, but H093 did not reach partition discovery, root mount, or /bin/sh in a 600 second capture.
interpretation: The quiet run narrowed the next question to CMD18 PIO progress after mmcblk0 discovery. It did not produce evidence of an IDMAC fallback or a new controller error.
guardrails: No DTS pollution for vendor U-Boot.
Cubie3 restored to vendor 5.15.147-21-a733 after testing.
